# WorldLink Academy
> English language courses, IELTS preparation, and UK study visa support in Tashkent, Uzbekistan.

## About
WorldLink Academy is a language and professional support centre located at Shota Rustaveli 13A, Tashkent. We help students, professionals, and families in Tashkent prepare for study, work, and life abroad.

## Services
- General English (Beginner to Advanced)
- Academic English (University-ready writing)
- Business English (Professional communication)
- Exam Preparation (IELTS and international exams)
- Dissertation Support (Research and writing guidance)
- Business Communication (Email, calls and negotiation)
- Virtual Meeting Support (Real-time language help)
- Visa Application Support (Documents and interviews)
- Study and Living Abroad (UK-focused guidance)
- School and College Applications (Admissions assistance)
- Professional Representation (International partnerships)
